textEn: About what are they asking one another?
About the great news -
That over which they are in disagreement.
No! They are going to know.
Then, no! They are going to know.
Have We not made the earth a resting place?
And the mountains as stakes?
And We created you in pairs.
And made your sleep [a means for] rest
And made the night as clothing1.
And made the day for livelihood.
And constructed above you seven strong [heavens].
textTranslit: Wa banaina fauqakum sab 'an shi daada

textEn: And made [therein] a burning lamp
And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water.
textTranslit: Wa anzalna minal m'usiraati maa-an saj-jaaja

textEn: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation.
textTranslit: Linukh rija bihee habbaw wana baata

textEn: And gardens of entwined growth.
Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -

textAr: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
textEn: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
textTranslit: Yauma yun fakhu fis-soori fataa toona afwaaja

textEn: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways.
textTranslit: Wa futiha tis samaa-u fakaanat abwaaba

textEn: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
textTranslit: Wa suyyi raatil jibaalu fa kaanat saraaba

textEn: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
For the transgressors, a place of return,
In which they will remain for ages [unending].

textAr: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
textEn: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink.
textTranslit: Laa ya zooqoona feeha bar daw walaa sharaaba

textEn: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
An appropriate recompense.
Indeed, they were not expecting an account
And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.
textTranslit: Wa kazzabu bi aayaa tina kizzaba

textEn: But all things We have enumerated in writing.
textTranslit: Wa kulla shai-in ahsai naahu kitaa ba

textEn: "So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment."
textTranslit: Fa zooqoo falan-nazee dakum ill-laa azaaba

textEn: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
Gardens and grapevines.
And full-breasted [companions] of equal age.
And a full cup.

textAr: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
textEn: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
textTranslit: Laa yasma'oona fiha lagh waw walaa kizzaba

textEn: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,

textAr: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
textEn: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
textTranslit: Rabbis samaa waati wal ardi wa maa baina humar rahmaani laa yam likoona minhu khi taaba

textAr: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
textEn: The Day that the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
textTranslit: Yauma yaqoo mur roohu wal malaa-ikatu saf-fal laa yata kalla moona illa man azina lahur rahmaanu wa qaala sawaaba

textAr: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
textEn: That is the True [i.e., certain] Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
textTranslit: Zaalikal yaumul haqqu faman shaa-at ta khaaza ill-laa rabbihi ma-aaba

textAr: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
textEn: Indeed, We have warned you of an impending punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust!"
textTranslit: In naa anzar naakum azaaban qareebaiy-yauma yan zurul marr-u maa qaddamat yadaahu wa ya qoolul-kaafiru yaa lai tanee kuntu turaaba
